changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating channel table for event streaming channels.
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(500) NULL, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL, organization_id INTEGER NULL, status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organization(id) ON DELETE CASCADE );

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating indexes and unique constraints for channel table.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for channel table, columns, and indexes.
